---
title: ""
output: html_document
---

# Penn (Go Quakers!)

I currently have the incredible opportunity to attend the University of Pennsylvania as a Biostatistics PhD Student. Come back to learn more about my journey here!

<div style="text-align: center;">
  <img src="images/upenn_ben.png" alt="Franklin" width="500" style="border: 4px solid black;"/>
  <br/>
  <em>Benjamin Franklin</em>
</div>
